name: @platform/zerodash-service
description: The per-game platform service for ZeroDash. Unity talks to this, not directly to save-service — owns ZeroDash's save shape and delegates the generic save mechanic to save-service internally. Simpler reference case for the per-game-service tier (no gameplay-event endpoint yet, unlike warzone-service's mission-completed) — see architecture/00-platform-vision.md.
